name: 🎁 AI Festival Campaign Generator PRO - 4-Agent Production Engine

parameters.formDescription: Select festival + enter product details. AI generates complete festival campaign — themed ad copies, email sequences, social posts, WhatsApp offers, influencer briefs, discount strategy, AI-generated festive visuals.

values.placeholder: Paste everything: ingredients, features, benefits, size, variants, certifications, what makes it a great festival gift/purchase
e.g. MRP ₹599 → Festival Price ₹399 (33% off) or Buy 2 Get 1 Free
e.g. Women 22-35 metro cities, gift buyers, self-purchase skincare enthusiasts, budget ₹500-2000
e.g. Own website, Amazon, Flipkart, Nykaa

parameters.jsCode:
const f=$input.first().json;const g=(k)=>(f[k]||'').trim();
const campaignId='FEST-'+g('Brand Name').toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,'').substring(0,8)+'-'+g('Festival').toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,'').substring(0,6)+'-'+Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase();
return [{json:{
  festival:g('Festival'),
  productName:g('Product Name'),
  category:g('Product Category'),
  productDesc:g('Product Details & Key Features'),
  price:g('MRP & Festival Offer'),
  targetAudience:g('Target Audience'),
  brandName:g('Brand Name'),
  brandVoice:g('Brand Voice'),
  campaignDuration:g('Campaign Duration (Days)'),
  competitors:g('Competitor Brands'),
  availableOn:g('Available On'),
  ownerName:g('Brand Owner Name'),
  ownerEmail:g('Brand Owner Email'),
  agentName:g('Your Name'),
  agencyName:g('Agency Name'),
  agentEmail:g('Your Email'),
  campaignId,
  timestamp:new Date().toISOString(),
  dateGenerated:new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'})
}}];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'You are a senior festival marketing strategist specializing in Indian D2C brands. Analyze the festival context and generate cultural intelligence for campaign creation.

FESTIVAL: ' + $json.festival + '
PRODUCT: ' + $json.productName + ' (' + $json.category + ')
BRAND: ' + $json.brandName + '
TARGET: ' + $json.targetAudience + '
COMPETITORS: ' + ($json.competitors || 'None specified') + '
CAMPAIGN DURATION: ' + $json.campaignDuration + '

Generate EXACT JSON:
{
  "festival_context": "What this festival means culturally and emotionally to Indian consumers. 3 sentences.",
  "shopping_behavior": "How consumers shop during this festival — what they buy, gifting patterns, budget mindset, impulse vs planned. 3 sentences.",
  "emotional_triggers": ["5 emotional triggers specific to this festival that drive purchases — e.g. gifting guilt, self-reward, tradition, renewal, celebration"],
  "festival_hashtags": ["20 trending and relevant hashtags for this festival including branded ones"],
  "color_palette": "Festival-appropriate colors for creatives — e.g. Diwali: gold/maroon/orange, Holi: multicolor/vibrant, Christmas: red/green/gold",
  "greeting_styles": ["3 festival greeting openers that can start ads/emails — culturally appropriate and warm"],
  "gifting_angle": "How this product can be positioned as the perfect festival gift. 2 sentences.",
  "self_purchase_angle": "How to position this as a treat-yourself festival purchase. 2 sentences.",
  "urgency_hooks": ["5 festival-specific urgency hooks — e.g. Limited Diwali Edition, Festival stock running out, Last day of festive offer"],
  "competitor_festival_gaps": "What competitors typically miss during this festival that this brand can exploit. 2 sentences.",
  "recommended_discount_structure": {"primary_offer": "Best offer type for this festival+category", "bundle_offer": "Festival bundle suggestion", "early_bird": "Pre-festival early access offer", "last_day": "Last day urgency offer"},
  "campaign_phases": [{"phase": "Phase name", "days": "Day range", "objective": "What to achieve", "channels": "Which platforms"}],
  "festival_image_prompt": "Detailed AI image generation prompt for a stunning festival-themed product visual. Include festival elements (diyas for Diwali, colors for Holi, etc), product placement, lighting, mood. 100 words.",
  "festival_story_prompt": "AI image prompt for Instagram story visual — vertical 9:16, festival themed, eye-catching. 80 words."
}

All insights must be specific to ' + $json.festival + ' in India. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown no backticks.' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.8, maxOutputTokens: 3000 } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.agent2Prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.8, maxOutputTokens: 28000, thinkingConfig: { thinkingBudget: 0 } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-image-2", prompt: ($('📊 Parse Festival Intel1').first().json.intel.festival_story_prompt || 'Vertical Instagram story visual for ' + $('📊 Parse Festival Intel1').first().json.festival + ' sale, eye-catching festival themed, ' + $json.productName) + '. Style: Instagram story, vertical 9:16, bold text space at top, festive colors, premium, attention-grabbing, ultra high quality.', size: "1024x1024" }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-image-2", prompt: 'Festive advertising banner for ' + $('📊 Parse Festival Intel1').first().json.festival + ' sale. Product: ' + $('📊 Parse Festival Intel1').first().json.productName + '. ' + ($('📊 Parse Festival Intel1').first().json.intel.color_palette || 'festive colors') + '. Leave clear empty space at top third for headline text overlay. Eye-catching, premium e-commerce ad creative, landscape 16:9, ultra high quality.', size: "1024x1024" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.qaPrompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.4, maxOutputTokens: 4000, thinkingConfig: { thinkingBudget: 0 } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are an expert multilingual copywriter for Indian D2C brands. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: "Festival: " + $json.festival + ", Product: " + $json.productName + ", Brand: " + $json.brandName + ", Price: " + $json.price + ". Generate festival marketing copy in 4 Indian languages. Return JSON: { \"hindi\": { \"tagline\": \"...\", \"headline\": \"...\", \"whatsapp\": \"...\", \"cta\": \"...\" }, \"tamil\": { \"tagline\": \"...\", \"headline\": \"...\", \"whatsapp\": \"...\", \"cta\": \"...\" }, \"bengali\": { \"tagline\": \"...\", \"headline\": \"...\", \"whatsapp\": \"...\", \"cta\": \"...\" }, \"marathi\": { \"tagline\": \"...\", \"headline\": \"...\", \"whatsapp\": \"...\", \"cta\": \"...\" } }" }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 1500, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a competitive intelligence expert for Indian D2C brands. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: "Festival: " + $json.festival + ", Our Product: " + $json.productName + ", Our Brand: " + $json.brandName + ", Our Price: " + $json.price + ", Competitors: " + $json.competitors + ". Analyse what festival campaigns our competitors are likely running and generate counter-ads. Return JSON: { \"competitor_likely_angles\": [{ \"competitor\": \"...\", \"likely_headline\": \"...\", \"likely_offer\": \"...\", \"weakness\": \"...\" }], \"counter_ads\": [{ \"targets_competitor\": \"...\", \"our_headline\": \"...\", \"our_hook\": \"...\", \"our_cta\": \"...\", \"why_we_win\": \"...\" }], \"festival_positioning_gap\": \"...\", \"recommended_attack_angle\": \"...\" }" }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a D2C growth analyst specializing in Indian festival commerce. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: "Festival: " + $json.festival + ", Product: " + $json.productName + ", Category: " + $json.category + ", Price: " + $json.price + ", Budget: " + $json.campaignDuration + ", Target Audience: " + $json.targetAudience + ", Available On: " + $json.availableOn + ". Predict festival campaign ROI. Return JSON: { \"projected_revenue_inr\": \"...\", \"projected_units_sold\": \"...\", \"estimated_cac_inr\": \"...\", \"estimated_roas\": \"...\", \"break_even_units\": \"...\", \"best_performing_channel\": \"...\", \"peak_sales_window\": \"...\", \"risk_factors\": [\"...\", \"...\"], \"optimization_tips\": [\"...\", \"...\", \"...\"], \"confidence_score\": \"...\" }" }] }) }}
